zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Gascoigne於大約1471年出生在英國越可爾加福索普時，她的父親Sir William Gascoigne V23歲，母親Margaret Percy25歲。她於1494年4月與George Taylboys在英國林可爾史爾吉結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1559年8月在英國越可爾利朋享年89歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾波斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Gascoigne于大约1471年出生在英国越可爾加福索普时，她的父亲Sir William Gascoigne V23岁，母亲Margaret Percy25岁。她于1494年4月与George Taylboys在英国林可爾史爾吉结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1559年8月在英国越可爾利朋享年89岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾波斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Gascoigne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Anglo-Norman French Gascon, Middle English Gascoun, Gascon ‘Gascon, native of Gascony’ or the adjective Gascuinz ‘of Gascony’. The name of the region derives from that of the Basques, who are found close by and formerly extended into this region as well; they are first named in Roman sources as Vascōnes, but the original meaning of the name derived from a root eusk- in the non-Indo-European language that they still speak today, is completely obscure. By the Middle Ages the Basques had been displaced from most of Gascony by speakers of Gascon (a dialect of Occitan, related to French), who were proverbial for their boastfulness. In the 11th century Gascony united with Aquitaine and was thus held by England between 1154 and 1453.

variants.name: Gascon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Jaime, Mario, Miguel, Rafael, Ruben, Amado, Ana, Ana Maria, Angel, Caridad.  French Andre, Chantal, Jean-Guy, Jean-Philippe, Monique, Serge, Simonne.
French; Spanish (Gascón): habitational name for someone from the province of Gascony, Old French Gascogne (see Gascoigne ). This surname is also found in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Gascoigne was born about 1471, in Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir William Gascoigne V, was 23 and her mother, Margaret Percy, was 25. She married George Taylboys in April 1494, in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died in August 1559, in Ripon, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 89, and was buried in Boston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Gascoigne est née environ 1471, à Gawthorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Gascoigne V, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret Percy, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé George Taylboys en avril 1494, à Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en août 1559, à Ripon, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Boston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Gascoigne um 1471 in Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Gascoigne V 23 und ihre Mutter Margaret Percy 25. Sie hat im April 1494 in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England George Taylboys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb im August 1559 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Ripon, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Boston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Gascoigneが約1471年にイギリスヨークシュアイアガウソルペで生まれた時，父Sir William Gascoigne Vは23歳，母Margaret Percyは25歳であった。1494年4月にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアクイメでGeorge Taylboysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1559年8月にイギリスヨークシュアイアリプオンで89歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Gascoigne(이)가 대략 1471년 영국 요르크실르 가w소에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Gascoigne V(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Percy(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1494년 4월 영국 링코실르 키에서 George Taylboys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1559년 8월 영국 요르크실르 리폰에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 보스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Gascoigne nasceu aproximadamente 1471, em Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Gascoigne V, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Percy, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com George Taylboys em abril de 1494, em Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em agosto de 1559, em Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 89 anos, e foi sepultada em Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Gascoigne родилась около 1471 г. в местности гавтаурп, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Gascoigne V было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Percy, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Taylboys апрель 1494 г. в местности ким, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла август 1559 г. в местности рипон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности бостон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con George Taylboys en abril de 1494, en Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en agosto de 1559, en Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultada en Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
